steps.title: Read values from the graph at x = 2 and x = 6
steps.content: From the graph, at x = 2 seconds, the momentum is y = 2 newton-seconds. At x = 6 seconds, the momentum is y = 8 newton-seconds.

steps.title: Apply the average rate of change formula
steps.content:
The average rate of change is the ratio of the change in momentum to the change in time:

$$\text{Average rate of change} = \frac{y_2 - y_1}{x_2 - x_1} = \frac{8 - 2}{6 - 2} = \frac{6}{4} = \frac{3}{2} = 1.5$$

The average rate of change is 1.5 newton-seconds per second.
